name: Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Prepare a 8-inch square pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine egg whites, sugar, vanilla, and marshmallow cream. In another mixing bowl,
combine cocoa powder, flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Mix dry ingredients with wet
ingredients just until moistened. Bake for 30 minutes.
